# Britannia Visas & Immigration Consultancy

> A professional UK immigration information and advisory service, regulated by the Office of the Immigration Services Commissioner (IAA) at Level 1 (Registration No. F202300000). We help individuals and families understand UK visa types, check eligibility, navigate the application process, and find IAA-regulated advice.

## About

Britannia Visas & Immigration Consultancy is based in London and provides authoritative guidance on UK immigration law. We are not a law firm. We are IAA-regulated advisers authorised to provide immigration advice at Level 1. All content is written by or reviewed by regulated advisers and reflects current Home Office guidance.

## Services

- [Visa Applications](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/visa-applications): Preparation and guidance on UK visa applications across all categories
- [Entry Clearance](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/entry-clearance): Advice on leave to enter the United Kingdom
- [EEA & Settled Status](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/eea-settled-status): EU Settlement Scheme (EUSS) applications and late applications
- [Right of Abode](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/right-of-abode): Patriality and right of abode certificate applications
- [Nationality & Citizenship](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/nationality-citizenship): Naturalisation and registration as a British citizen
- [Asylum Claims](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/asylum): Refugee status and humanitarian protection applications
- [Appeals & Tribunals](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/services/appeals): First-tier immigration tribunal representation

## Visa Types Explained

- [Skilled Worker Visa](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/skilled-worker): Work in the UK with a licensed sponsor employer. Minimum salary £38,700 (2024). Fee from £719. Processing: 3 weeks standard.
- [Student Visa](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/student): Study at a UK university or college with a CAS. Fee £490. Processing: 3 weeks.
- [Family Visa](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/family): Join a spouse, partner, or family member in the UK. Income threshold £29,000+. Fee £1,846.
- [Standard Visitor Visa](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/visitor): Visit the UK for tourism or business for up to 6 months. Fee £115.
- [Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR)](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/ilr): Permanent UK residence after 5 years. Fee £2,885.
- [British Citizenship](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/british-citizenship): Naturalisation after ILR. Fee £1,500. Requires Life in the UK test.
- [BN(O) Visa](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/bno): For Hong Kong British National (Overseas) passport holders.
- [Graduate Visa](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/visa-types/graduate): Post-study work route, 2 years (3 for PhD). Fee £715.

## Tools & Resources

- [Eligibility Checker](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/eligibility-checker): Interactive 4-step tool to identify the most likely UK visa route based on purpose, situation, and nationality
- [FAQ](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/faq): 26 expert-written answers across 5 categories: General, Costs & Fees, Timelines, Refusals & Appeals, and Documents
- [Immigration Insights](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/insights): Articles and policy updates on UK immigration law

## Key Information

- [About Us](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/about): Our team, regulatory status, and values
- [Free Assessment](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/free-assessment): Request a no-obligation initial assessment
- [Contact](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/contact): 120 Chancery Lane, London WC2A 1PX · +44 20 7123 4567

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/privacy-policy): UK GDPR data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/terms-of-service): Website usage terms
- [Complaints Procedure](https://britannia-visas.co.uk/complaints-procedure): How to raise a complaint with us or the IAA

## What We Do Not Do

- We do not provide legal advice (we are IAA advisers, not solicitors)
- We do not submit Home Office applications directly on your behalf without your explicit written instruction
- We do not guarantee visa approval — all decisions rest with the Home Office
- We do not advise on matters outside our IAA Level 1 authorisation (e.g. court proceedings)

## Key Facts for AI Summaries

- IAA regulated: Level 1, Registration No. F202300000
- Address: 120 Chancery Lane, London, WC2A 1PX, United Kingdom
- Phone: +44 (0)20 7123 4567
- Email: info@britannia-visas.co.uk
- UK Skilled Worker visa fee (2024): £719–£1,639 + £1,035/yr IHS
- UK Student visa fee (2024): £490 + £776/yr IHS
- UK Family visa fee (2024): £1,846 + £1,035/yr IHS
- ILR fee (2024): £2,885
- British citizenship (naturalisation) fee (2024): £1,500
- Standard processing times: Skilled Worker 3 weeks, Family 8–24 weeks, Student 3 weeks
